topic: collective authorship and first-version framing
reason: Needed for creator attribution, educator-producer origin, and version boundary.

topic: individual member names and affiliations
reason: Creator is attributed as the v. 1 KECC Collective; personal-name recall is not an ethics learning objective.

topic: professionalism as ethical standards rather than income
reason: Preserves the source's meaning of professional without inventing certification.

topic: educators as behavioral models and booking status
reason: Central systems rationale for educator and producer responsibilities.

locator: Visible date and Frequently Asked Questions
topic: version 1 dated 25 April 2019 and expected revision
reason: Prevents presenting a historical version as current consensus.

locator: Frequently Asked Questions and Adopting the KECC
topic: no Collective monitoring or centralized enforcement
reason: Retained only as an authority limitation; no enforcement process or legal claim is inferred.

topic: individual practice examples and rhetorical questions
reason: Examples and page-format rhetoric do not add durable conduct knowledge.

topic: roadmap rather than precise legal code
reason: Essential scope and interpretation boundary.

topic: educator producer and discussion structure
reason: Preserves responsibility separation and explanatory context.

topic: capacity informed explicit continuous noncoerced consent
reason: Core consent-modeling framework retained as version-1 commitments.

topic: no implied classroom touch and specific verbal agreement
reason: Central classroom safeguard.

topic: avoid new negotiation before audience and make prior consent legible
reason: Preserves distinction between consent and visible pedagogical modeling.

topic: consent integrated into programs policies and staff expectations
reason: Producer role is a requested core topic.

topic: power differential social pressure and intrinsic classroom risk
reason: Explains why nominal volunteering is not sufficient.

topic: preference for existing partners or educators and advance volunteers
reason: Preference hierarchy retained without converting demonstrations into technique instructions.

topic: specific advance time threshold
reason: General advance selection and written negotiation retain the safeguard without teaching a portable sufficiency threshold.

topic: announce volunteers explain risks no targeting no repeated pressure skip if none
reason: High-value anti-coercion safeguards.

topic: enthusiastic agreement opt-out selection and inclusive representation
reason: Preserves student agency and inclusion.

locator: Using students for demos — Educator and Producer
topic: aftercare planning and support after bad experience
reason: Planning duty retained without prescribing an aftercare procedure.

topic: teach within expertise and disclose departures from common practice
reason: Core competence and qualification-disclosure knowledge.

topic: professional qualification review or personal-opinion disclosure
reason: Prevents adjacent-domain authority laundering.

topic: expert amateur context and lack of formal standards
reason: Retained to block invented certification, not to disparage expertise.

topic: risk-profile respect auditing risk communication and venue policy
reason: Requested autonomy and risk-profile material.

topic: named high-risk medical legal and kink practices
reason: Names are category examples, not authorization or operational technique content.

topic: nondiscrimination pronouns gender neutrality and learning access
reason: Core inclusion and accessibility duties.

topic: microaggression categories
reason: Conceptual distinction retained; culture-specific examples omitted.

topic: diverse staffing perspectives event design feedback and trauma support
reason: Preserves producer-side inclusion system.

topic: conduct code incident reporting and trained response staff
reason: Event structure retained without implying policy existence proves safety or compliance.

topic: feedback acknowledgment repair learning and changed behavior
reason: Core accountability model.

topic: public commitment contact routes and written process
reason: Preserves contact and process responsibilities while disclaiming enforcement.

topic: accountability contact and circle definitions
reason: Explicitly requested knowledge.

topic: independence multiple contacts diversity approachability and central repository
reason: High-value design and conflict-of-interest considerations.

topic: professional classroom and private-lesson boundaries
reason: Requested educator-student boundary material.

locator: Boundaries with students — Educator and Discussion
topic: relationship policy power discussion and mentorship boundary negotiation
reason: Preserves power-differential and disclosure reasoning without certifying relationships.

topic: specific waiting period
reason: A version-specific time threshold is not retained as a portable ethical safe harbor.

locator: Boundaries with students — Producer and Discussion
topic: written producer standards and no professional-opportunity exchange
reason: Preserves institutional boundary and conflict-of-interest duty.

topic: honest booking information logistics preparation and reliability
reason: Durable educator conduct principles.

topic: vetting misconduct proportionate roles disclosure reports and support
reason: Requested producer vetting framework.

topic: vetting intake topics and independent sources
reason: Topics retained as prompts, not a scoring or clearance checklist.

topic: named external producer network and personal names
reason: External link and people are not enduring conduct knowledge and were outside the source allowlist.

topic: bidirectional venue and educator vetting
reason: Preserves de facto endorsement and institutional-status reasoning.

topic: injury consent-incident accountability and exclusion disclosure
reason: Explicitly requested incident-disclosure knowledge.

topic: no silence pressure retaliation or intrusion into private forums
reason: Core speech, privacy, and accountability safeguard.

locator: Disclosure and privacy — Producer and Discussion
topic: privacy informed choice community safety and proportionate response tension
reason: Requested privacy tension retained without inventing a resolution.

topic: legal evidentiary reporting and data-protection conclusions
reason: The source supplies ethical tensions, not jurisdiction-specific legal answers.

topic: attribution licence link adaptation notice and ShareAlike
reason: Required rights metadata; not an ethics learning claim.

topic: licence legal text
reason: Reviewed only to validate compatible metadata; no legal-code prose is training content.

topic: navigation scripts styles fonts CC badge and third-party pages
reason: Site chrome, media, code, and outside works are not part of the adapted prose.

topic: raw PDF layout repeated headers footers and file paths
reason: Machine-generated layout artifacts and raw source are not direct training material.

topic: current consensus certification safety and enforcement implications
reason: Version-1 commitments cannot prove present consensus, compliance, licensure, legal status, or safety.
